page_metadata.biotools__summary: WebFR3D is the online version of Find RNA 3D, a program for annotating atomic-resolution RNA 3D structure files and searching them efficiently to locate RNA 3D structural motifs such as hairpin, internal or junction loops and sarcin-ricin and kink tun internal loops.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: WebFR3D is the online version of Find RNA 3D, a program for annotating atomic-resolution RNA 3D structure files and searching them efficiently to locate RNA 3D structural motifs such as hairpin, internal or junction loops and sarcin-ricin and kink tun internal loops.
